title: Why You Feel So Stuck In Life & How To Find Success
description: In this video, Sandeep breaks down five surprising disciplines to uncover unconventional lessons about success. Along the way, he shares personal stories from his life as a monk to boardroom lessons that reveal how doubt, failure, and even walking away can shape a more meaningful path. If you've ever felt pressured by the success of everyone around this, this perspective offers something deeper: practical, timeless principles to help you tilt the odds, design for failure, and build success on your own terms.
transcript:
